title: Ottelia songmingensis
taxonomy: Ottelia songmingensis is classified within the family Hydrocharitaceae, which is a family of aquatic plants commonly known as the frogbit or water-dyott family. This family is further grouped into the order Alismatales, a large and diverse order of aquatic and terrestrial plants. The class Liliopsida, to which the family Hydrocharitaceae belongs, is a group of monocots that are primarily herbaceous. The subclass Alismatidae, which contains the order Alismatales, is part of the larger group called the monocots. At the most basic level, Ottelia songmingensis is classified as a plant kingdom member.
